differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic inflammatory syndrome
next_steps: Perform serum ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble IL-2 receptor levels to evaluate for HLH
Obtain magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to evaluate biliary pathology
Perform peripheral blood smear for detection of morulae within neutrophils to rule out anaplasmosis
Monitor liver enzymes and inflammatory markers closely; keep targeted therapy (dabrafenib and trametinib) discontinued
Consider liver biopsy if symptoms or biochemical abnormalities persist without clear cause
